pytorch.reason: load-bearing: GL(3,R) matrix operations (det, inverse, matmul) verify invertibility constraint directly via torch.linalg.

pyg.reason: not used: this probe isolates GL(3,R) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

z3.reason: load-bearing: z3 UNSAT proves that no matrix with det=0 can be in GL(3,R); singular matrices are structurally excluded by the invertibility constraint.

clifford.reason: load-bearing: GL(3,R) acts on R^3 as linear maps; Clifford algebra Cl(3,0) contains the grade-1 subspace isomorphic to R^3; this probe verifies GL action preserves the grade-1 subspace.

scaling_in_GL3.detail: det(diag(2,3,5)) = 30.0: non-unit-det matrix is in GL(3,R)

gl3_inverse.detail: A @ A^{-1} = I: GL(3,R) inverse exists

gl3_lie_algebra_dimension.detail: gl(3) Lie algebra has 9 basis generators Eij

z3_singular_excluded.detail: z3 UNSAT: no element with det=0 satisfies GL invertibility constraint

bracket_E00_E01.detail: [E00, E01] = E01 (E00 raises weight of E01)

jacobi_identity.detail: Jacobi identity holds for gl(3) basis elements

gl3_is_tower_root.detail: GL(3) is the root of the G-tower reduction graph

tower_depth.detail: G-tower has 5 reduction steps from GL(3) to Sp(6)

geomstats_gl3_identity_belongs.detail: geomstats: identity matrix belongs to GL(3,R) manifold

clifford_grade1_preserved.detail: GL(3) scaling map preserves grade-1 subspace of Cl(3,0)

singular_not_in_GL3.detail: det=0 matrix excluded from GL(3,R): not invertible

lie_bracket_noncommutative.detail: [E01, E12] != [E12, E01]: Lie bracket is antisymmetric, not commutative

gl1_nonzero.detail: GL(1,R): any nonzero scalar is invertible

gl3_closure_under_mult.detail: GL(3) closure: A @ A^{-1} = I (group axiom)
